code: import React,{useMemo}from'react';import TabPage from'../../components/common/TabPage';import{FiBook,FiList}from'react-icons/fi';import{usePermission}from'../../context/AuthContext';import TrainingCourses from'./TrainingCourses';import TrainingRecords from'./TrainingRecords';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const baseTabs=[{key:'courses',label:'Courses',icon:FiBook,component:TrainingCourses,permission:'admin'},{key:'records',label:'Training Records',icon:FiList,component:TrainingRecords,permission:'admin'}];const TrainingPage=()=>{const _usePermission=usePermission(),hasModuleAccess=_usePermission.hasModuleAccess;const tabs=useMemo(()=>baseTabs.filter(t=>hasModuleAccess(t.permission)),[hasModuleAccess]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TabPage,{tabs:tabs,defaultTab:"courses",moduleIcon:FiBook,moduleTitle:"Training"});};export default TrainingPage;
